hero.description: From secret tips about mechanics to vital tricks for the Leagues. Your success manual lives here.

beginner.title: The Beginner's Path
beginner.description: Just arrived? Follow this simple 3-step guide to master the platform in 5 magical minutes.

cta.title: Still haven't found what you were looking for?
cta.description: Our human support team has been trained to light your path (and sleeps the necessary hours). Open a ticket anytime!

o-que-e-xp.title: What are Experience Points (XP)?
o-que-e-xp.summary: Discover how to earn XP and why it is the engine of your success.
o-que-e-xp.content:
Experience Points (XP) represent your overall level of linguistic knowledge and your effort on our platform.

Whenever you successfully complete practical exercises, lessons, or Arcade challenges, you will be rewarded with XP. The amount of XP earned depends on several factors:

  • Basic Lessons: Yield standard XP based on the length of the lesson.
  • Reviews: Because repetition also has merit, doing correction exercises also awards an amount based on performance.
  • Combos: Consecutive perfect answers increase the multiplier!

XP is essential not only to measure your personal progress, but it is also the number that dictates your position in the Weekly Leagues.

como-funcionam-os-coracoes.title: How do Hearts (Lives) work?
como-funcionam-os-coracoes.summary: Understand the life system and how it shapes your learning pace.
como-funcionam-os-coracoes.content:
Your educational journey always begins with a limited stock of Hearts (Lives) - usually 5.

Whenever you make a mistake during conventional lessons, you will lose a heart. This forces a cautious pace and a more careful reading of the questions, to avoid playing 'trial and error'.

If you lose all your lives, guided lessons will be temporarily locked, until you recover your strength or find ways to restore your Hearts. No one learns well under exhaustion!

recuperar-vidas.title: How to recover lost Hearts?
recuperar-vidas.summary: Hit rock bottom? See how to get back in action quickly.
recuperar-vidas.content:
There are 3 main ways to replenish your stock of Hearts:

  • The time factor: Your profile regenerates hearts passively over time (wait a few hours and you will return with a full battery).
  • Content Review: On the main screen you can choose the 'Practice' button (where your hearts failed in the past). For each completed practice session, you earn +1 Heart.
  • Using Gems: If the desperation of learning speaks louder, you can visit our Shop and spend your hard-earned Gems to make a full recharge!

a-ofensiva-streak.title: The Streak Flame
a-ofensiva-streak.summary: The internal fire of progress. Never let your streak die.
a-ofensiva-streak.content:
In the top corner of the screen you will notice a number accompanied by a flame: that is your Streak.

It counts the number of consecutive days you have completed at least one lesson or exercise. Our philosophy dictates that 10 minutes of intense study every day is more effective than 2 hours in a single weekend.

Marco, our AI mascot, gets extremely depressed when students let their streak extinguish. If this happens, your counter goes back to... zero. Cruel? Maybe. Effective? Experts say yes.

congelamentos-streak-freezes.title: Using Streak Freezes
congelamentos-streak-freezes.summary: Your insurance policy against forgetfulness and chaotic days.
congelamentos-streak-freezes.content:
We know that unforeseen events happen. Whether it's a tight exam or an emergency trip to the supermarket, sometimes we forget to practice.

That's why we invented Streak Freezes! Available in the Shop, these are invisible shields that, when active (or purchased in advance), repair your counter if you go a whole day without learning. The lost day is 'frozen' and your flame continues to crackle the next day.

Important note: You have a carrying limit of 2 Freezes. Always equip them.

missoes-diarias-baus.title: Daily Quests and Treasure Chests
missoes-diarias-baus.summary: Earn extra rewards by completing surprise objectives.
missoes-diarias-baus.content:
Through the 'Quests' tab you will discover a screen dedicated to Daily Quests.

These are 3 dynamic objectives that change every 24 hours. (Ex: 'Reach 50 XP', 'Perform 3 Perfect Lessons', 'Win Arcade mode').

When you reach the total progress bar of all missions, an Epic Chest is unlocked at the top of the page. You can smash the chest hard to claim your bonus Gems, extra XP or, who knows, free Freezes!

myduolingo-pro-vs-gratis.title: MyDuolingo PRO vs Free Plan
myduolingo-pro-vs-gratis.summary: Discover the exclusive benefits of the PRO plan and how it accelerates your progress.
myduolingo-pro-vs-gratis.content:
MyDuolingo PRO is the ultimate experience for anyone serious about fluency in a new language. Unlike the Standard (Free) plan, PRO removes the barriers between you and knowledge.

Main PRO Benefits:

  • Infinite Hearts: Never stop a lesson halfway again. Make mistakes, learn and continue practicing without limits or regeneration waits.
  • Unlocked AI Practice: Full access to the AI Practice Area, including Fluid Conversation, AI-corrected Writing exercises and personalized Listening training.
  • Elite Status: Your profile proudly displays the Infinity icon on the leaderboards, showing your commitment to excellence.

To subscribe, visit our Shop. Processing is secure and access to premium features is immediate after payment confirmation.

sistema-de-divisoes.title: The League System
sistema-de-divisoes.summary: Where XP translates directly into global glory.
sistema-de-divisoes.content:
Welcome to the educational battlefront of MyDuolingo! The League System brings together a cohort of 30 randomly selected global students (but at your level) every Monday.

During the week, all you need to do is gather more XP than your rivals.

There are different tiers (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Sapphire, Titanium, Ruby, and Diamond). Reaching the Diamond league means you are part of the top 1% most addicted to knowledge in the world.

promocoes-despromocoes.title: Promotion and Demotion Zone
promocoes-despromocoes.summary: Green Zones, Red Zones, and the Weekly Tension.
promocoes-despromocoes.content:
The League grid doesn't just exist to show points, its interior is divided into three active zones:

  • Green Zone (Promotion): Usually the Top 5. Finishing in the Green Zone on Sunday night guarantees your passage to the next (and harder) League.
  • Yellow Zone (Maintenance): The middle ground. You secure your current spot.
  • Red Zone (Demotion): The bottom 5 students suffer drastic penalties — if the week closes and you fall here, you will be demoted to the lower division for the sake of thirstier rivals. Beware!

high-fives-e-feed-social.title: Interacting with Friends and High-Fives
high-fives-e-feed-social.summary: Learning with friends multiplies your willpower.
high-fives-e-feed-social.content:
The new 'Feed' area revolutionized MyDuolingo. You can search for Friends using their profile 'tag'.

In your social feed you will see brilliant moments (Ex: 'John advanced to the Diamond League!' or 'Maria completed an Incredible 30-Day Streak').

You can send High-Fives 🙌 on these notifications. With our tactile physics, you will see colorful hands bursting on your friends' interface, granting them tiny buffs and epic doses of dopamine.

sprint-vocabulario.title: Mode: Vocabulary Sprint
sprint-vocabulario.summary: Race against the clock. How good are your mental reflexes?
sprint-vocabulario.content:
Your thirst for speed finds its solution in the top screen: the Arcade Hub.

The Vocabulary Sprint is an *intense* challenge. You have exactly 60 seconds to match dozens of translation pairs.

But pay attention to the rhythm: winning is just the icing on the cake. The faster you make continuous combinations, you consume the 'Combo Bar'. Correct and rhythmic answers severely increase the XP points received in the maximum time limit. And your hands will sweat.

chuva-de-meteoros-swipe.title: Meteor Shower & Swipe Challenges
chuva-de-meteoros-swipe.summary: A different perspective where gravity decides your league.
chuva-de-meteoros-swipe.content:
In secondary Arcade modes (launched for temporary seasons), you might encounter the Meteor Shower.

The premise? The AI (Marco) launches heavy blocks from the ceiling of a virtual galaxy containing syllables or incomplete translations. You will have to resort to the Tinder-Swipe mechanic (violently dragging your card to Correct or Wrong) before the asteroid crashes against your base core and completely damages your Lives!

You earn exclusive XP from the 'Arcade Store'. Enter... if you have courage and agile fingers.

o-assistente-marco.title: Chatting with Marco (The Mascot)
o-assistente-marco.summary: Not just a pretty robot, he's the one in charge.
o-assistente-marco.content:
Marco is more than the app's floating green mascot. Developed with the most sophisticated LLM models integrated into the educational engine, he works in Chat Mode on the left side of your navigation Hub.

Are you stuck on German grammar or forgot Portuguese prefixes? Focus your attention on the chat and ask Marco's synthetic mind. In a friendly way (if you have an active streak), he breaks down your puzzle.

Warning: Marco wears an aviator hat for response aerodynamics.

alterar-nome-avatar.title: How to Change your Name and Avatar
alterar-nome-avatar.summary: Visual identity on the League leaderboard is a priority.
alterar-nome-avatar.content:
Your aesthetic says a lot about you, both to Marco and to your enemies in the Divisions.

Go to the Profile tab and click on the golden gear (Settings) at the top. There you will have free access to correct your 'Username' and manage your Avatar.

In the details, thanks to our Clerk integration, you can download a new High Resolution profile picture. We update your *leaderboard* photo instantly in a tactile way!

modo-escuro-e-temas.title: Dark Mode and Vision
modo-escuro-e-temas.summary: Learn about the app's color philosophy.
modo-escuro-e-temas.content:
A common question raised on our wall: Where do I turn on the brutal and mysterious Dark Mode?

By architectural design, MyDuolingo runs natively in a bright, clean environment (Stone-White aesthetic) and incredibly vibrant in pastel highlights intentionally, with the purpose of invoking high-voltage educational retention in the brain. Studies associate our native palette with higher productivity rates.

Do not be discouraged! The engineering team continues in the laboratory phase, considering creating an ultra-premium 'Midnight Mode' switch for those who suffer from eye fatigue after 2 AM.

deixar-feedback-mural.title: Carving your Signature on the Wall of Love
deixar-feedback-mural.summary: Feeling passionate about your fast results? Seal it in the Hall of Fame.
deixar-feedback-mural.content:
Our dynamics were born from the dozens of incredible voices of our students. To eternalize these opinions we founded the Wall of Love (Hall of Fame) mural.

To see the real mural, navigate to 'Support > Community Mural'.

In this area, you will be able to open our dazzling Tactile Modal, pushed from behind by the enthusiasm of the mascot Marco, in a floating format, leaving a full-bodied comment with 1 to 5 stars based on your experience. This component instantly injects your image and opinion on the main glorious screen so that the new traffic can see it too.

support_page.title: Student Support
support_page.description: MyDuolingo support center. Consult our knowledge base, contact the team, or submit a support ticket.

privacy.title: Privacy Notice
privacy.welcome_p1: This Privacy Notice for our Company describes how and why we may access, collect, store, use, and/or share ("process") your personal information when you use our services ("Services"), including when you visit our website or download and use our mobile application (MyDuolingo).
privacy.welcome_p2: Questions or concerns? Reading this Privacy Notice will help you understand your privacy rights and choices. If you do not agree with our policies and practices, please do not use our Services.
privacy.section1_p1: <strongTag>Personal information provided by you:</strongTag> We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you register for the Services, express interest in obtaining information about us or our products, or when you contact support. This information includes names, email addresses, usernames, and authentication data. We do not process sensitive information.
privacy.section1_p2: <strongTag>Social media login data:</strongTag> We may offer the option to register with us using social media details (such as Google SDK, Clerk). If you choose to register this way, we will collect certain profile information from the provider.
privacy.section1_p3: <strongTag>Application data:</strongTag> If you use our application, we may request access to push notifications for study alerts or reminders (which can be disabled) and the information essential for your security and device registration.
privacy.section23_title: 2 & 3. How and Why Do We Process Information?
privacy.section23_p1: We process your personal information to facilitate account creation and authentication and to manage user accounts. We also process information to prevent harm and protect vital interests.
privacy.section23_p2: The GDPR requires valid legal bases upon which we rely to process this information: User consent, Legal obligations, or Vital interests.
privacy.section45_p1: We may need to share your personal information in situations such as Business Transactions, or among our Business Partners and Affiliates to ensure the proper functioning of the App.
privacy.section45_p2: The application does not include abusive third-party advertising, but the Services may contain links to online websites or third-party subcontracted applications where the security of those links will be managed by the respective third parties and their own Policies.
privacy.section6_p1: We may use cookies and similar tracking technologies to collect information from your device while you interact with the Services (ensuring basic functionalities like automatic Clerk and ClerkJWT logins). Some online technologies help us prevent malicious cookies, fix interface bugs, and save your exams/shortcut modules.
privacy.section7_p1: <strongTag>The "Marco" Artificial Intelligence:</strongTag> As part of our Services, we offer AI-powered products. Your input and output with the mascot (Marco AI) managed by Google Gemini will be shared in compliance with Google Cloud AI Providers for Text Analysis and Language Corrections.
privacy.section7_p2: <strongTag>How to opt out:</strongTag> You can close the AI Dialogue panels immediately, and we take care not to record the traces in real-time at the database level beyond the vital memories to correct your educational errors.
privacy.section8_title: 8. How Do We Handle Social Logins?
privacy.section8_p1: Our Services allow authentication via social accounts (such as Discord and Google). We will use such information, like names and photos, only to simplify weekly leaderboards and their respective profiles.
privacy.section910_p1: We keep your information only for as long as strictly necessary. When there is no legitimate user need to possess such data, it will be discarded from our secure database in Drizzle Postgres.
privacy.section910_p2: We implement rigorous defenses but, please note that, even with full protection, no transmission over the Internet is 100% free from extremist cybercriminals.
privacy.section11_p1: In short: We do not knowingly collect data from or market to children under 18 years of age.
privacy.section11_p2: By using the Services, you declare that you are at least 18 years old or that you have a family member/guardian who is an adult taking responsibility for you for any and all activity on the platform.
privacy.section1216_p1: In the EU / EEA, you may always request copies or rectifications of total digital cleanup against the network that holds them. We will have full respect for settings such as the "Do Not Track" mode of the respective browsers.
privacy.section1216_p2: Note that we may at any time and instant alert all players about prominent updates to this legal path (14), in which you will have the full privilege of deleting the data or updating revisions from the Contact and Internal App Support options (15 & 16).

ui.sound_playback_failed: The sound file may not exist yet — failing silently

settings_components.pin_min_length_error: The PIN must be at least 4 characters long.
settings_components.key_not_found_error: Error: Private key not found on this device. Unlock your messages first.
settings_components.get_public_key_error: Error getting the current public key.
settings_components.save_pin_error: Error saving the new PIN to the server.
settings_components.vault_explanation: Your messages are End-to-End Encrypted (E2EE) using a Master Private Key that lives on your device. So you don't lose your history when switching phones, we back up your key to the cloud, but we lock that backup with your PIN (Zero-Knowledge Key Escrow). We never know what your PIN is, which means only you have the key to the vault.
settings_components.enter_new_pin_label: Enter your New PIN or Password
settings_components.pin_change_note: Note: Changing the PIN will not delete your messages. It only replaces the "lock" on your cloud vault.
settings_components.app_language_description: Choose the language you want to use to explore MyDuolingo.
settings_components.sound_description: Enable or disable app sound effects.
settings_components.confirm_language_change: Do you want to change the App language?
settings_components.theme_desc: Toggle between light and dark modes.

support.title: How can we help you today?
support.no_results_tip: Try using terms like "XP", "Leagues", or browse the Central Wall.
support.encyclopedia_desc: Do you have questions about the game engine? Explore our complete library of tutorials on Hearts, Leagues, Streaks, and much more.
support.marco_desc: Instant resolution for 99% of daily questions. Use the floating chat bubble and get your questions answered interactively.
support.email_desc: Complex issues? Speak directly to the platform's human engineers.
support.creator: The Creator
support.received_desc: Our engineering team has already placed your report in the priority queue.
support.submit_desc: Report serious bugs or suggest major improvements by filling in the details below.
support.field_message_placeholder: What did you expect to happen and what actually happened?
support.faq1_q: How do I climb the Division Leagues?
support.faq1_a: Earn XP (Experience Points) by successfully completing your lessons. At the end of the week, users in the promotion zone (green light) move up to the next global League.
support.faq2_q: Why did I lose my Hearts (Lives)?
support.faq2_a: During guided lessons, incorrect answers penalize your progress by subtracting lives (-1). If you lose all your lives, you must practice previous review exercises (Hearts) or buy them in the Store.
support.faq3_a: The golden flame measures the number of consecutive days you have completed at least one lesson. If you cannot practice on a given day, activate a Freeze in the shop in advance.
support.faq4_q: How do I enable the native Dark Mode?
support.faq4_a: This version is immersed in a light palette adapted to educational standards. Dark mode is currently in closed development by the engineers.
support.priority_support_desc: We guarantee a response within 2 business hours if you report total account lockout bugs.
support.try_using_terms: Try using terms like "XP", "Leagues", or browse the Central Mural.
support.direct_email_desc: Complex problems? Talk directly with the human engineers of the platform.
support.submit_ticket_desc: Report serious bugs or suggest deep improvements by filling in the details below.
support.verify_fields: Check the fields that were left unfilled or incorrect.
support.desc_placeholder: What did you expect to happen and what actually happened?
support.faq_1_q: How do I move up in the Division Leagues?
support.faq_1_a: Earn XP (Experience Points) by successfully completing your lessons. At the end of the week, users in the promotion zone (green light) advance to the next global League.
support.faq_2_q: Why did I lose my Hearts (Lives)?
support.faq_2_a: During guided lessons, incorrect answers penalize your progress by subtracting lives (-1). If you lose all lives, you must practice previous review exercises (Hearts) or buy them in the Store.
support.faq_3_a: The golden flame measures the number of consecutive days you have completed at least one lesson. If you cannot practice on a given day, activate a Freeze in the store in advance.
support.faq_4_q: How do I activate native Dark Mode?
support.faq_4_a: This version is immersed in a light palette adapted to education standards. Dark mode is in closed development by engineers.

learn.completed_course_desc: You have completed all lessons in this course! Claim your certificate now to prove your mastery.

By accessing the Services, you represent that you have read, understood and agreed to all of these Legal Terms. IF YOU DO NOT AGREE WITH ALL OF THESE LEGAL TERMS, YOU ARE EXPRESSLY PROHIBITED FROM USING THE SERVICES AND YOU MUST CEASE USE IMMEDIATELY.
terms.intro_4: Any supplemental terms and conditions or documents that may be published on the Services from time to time are expressly incorporated by reference. We reserve the right, in our sole discretion, to make changes or modifications to these Legal Terms at any time and for any reason.

Accordingly, persons who choose to access the Services from other locations do so on their own initiative and are solely responsible for compliance with local laws, if and to the extent local laws are applicable.
terms.section_2_p1: Our intellectual property: We are the owner or licensee of all intellectual property rights in our Services, including all source code, databases, functionality, software, website designs, audio, video, text, photographs and graphics in the Services (collectively, the "Content"), as well as the trademarks, service marks and logos contained therein (the "Marks"). Our Content and Marks are protected by copyright and trademark laws (and various other intellectual property rights and unfair competition laws) and treaties around the world. The Content and Marks are provided on or through the Services "AS IS" for your personal, non-commercial use or internal business purposes only.
terms.section_2_p2: Your use of our Services: Subject to your compliance with these Legal Terms, including the "PROHIBITED ACTIVITIES" section below, we grant you a non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to access the Services; and download or print a copy of any part of the Content to which you have properly gained access, solely for your personal, non-commercial use or internal business purposes.
terms.section_2_p3: Your Submissions: By directly sending us any questions, comments, suggestions, ideas, feedback or other information about the Services ("Submissions"), you agree to assign to us all intellectual property rights in that Submission.
terms.section_3_p1: By using the Services, you represent and warrant that: (1) you have legal capacity and agree to comply with these Legal Terms; (2) is not a minor in the jurisdiction in which he resides; (3) you will not access the Services through automated or nonhuman means, whether through a robot, script, or otherwise; (4) you will not use the Services for any illegal or unauthorized purpose; and (5) your use of the Services will not violate any applicable laws or regulations.
terms.section_3_p2: If you provide any information that is untrue, inaccurate, not current, or incomplete, we have the right to suspend or terminate your account and refuse any current or future use of the Services (or any part thereof).
terms.section_4_p1: You may not access or use the Services for any purpose other than that for which we make the Services available. The Services may not be used in connection with any commercial endeavors except those that are specifically endorsed or approved by us.
terms.section_4_p2: As a user of the Services, you agree not to:
terms.section_4_list_1: Systematically extract data or other content from the Services.
terms.section_4_list_2: Trick, defraud, or deceive us and other users.
terms.section_4_list_3: Circumvent, disable, or otherwise interfere with security-related features of the Services.
terms.section_4_list_4: Disparage, tarnish, or otherwise harm, in our opinion, us and/or the Services.
terms.section_4_list_5: Use any information obtained from the Services to harass, abuse, or harm another person.
terms.section_4_list_6: Use the Services in a manner inconsistent with any applicable laws or regulations.
terms.section_4_list_7: Upload or transmit viruses, Trojan horses, or other material that interferes with your use of the Services.
terms.section_4_list_8: Engage in any automated use of the system, such as using scripts to send comments or messages, or using any data mining, robots, or similar tools.
terms.section_5_p1: The Services do not provide users with the ability to submit or publish content. We may provide you the opportunity to create, submit, publish, display, transmit content and materials to us ("Contributions").
terms.section_5_p2: You and the Services agree that we may access, store, process and use any information and personal data you provide and your choices. We do not claim any ownership of your Contributions.

licenses.gemini_desc: The generative artificial intelligence model underlying the Marco AI mascot.

landing.title: Learn Languages by Playing — Free
landing.description: The free platform that teaches you English, Spanish and other languages through short, gamified lessons. Earn XP, compete in leagues and grow with your friends.
landing.hero_title: The <green>free</green>, fun, and effective way to learn a language!
landing.hero_desc: Join us and start learning today with short, addictive lessons.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Track your language mastery.
analytics.come_back_tomorrow: You can do better, come back tomorrow! ⏰

share.modal_description: Learning languages is easier with friends. Invite them and show who rules the Leaderboard!
share.share_text: I'm having a blast learning on MyDuolingo! Join me and let's see who leads the Leaderboard. 🚀

intro.step1: Hello! Welcome to your new learning adventure.
intro.step2: This app was inspired by Duolingo and built with a lot of love so we can all learn together.
intro.step3: You'll be able to compete in leagues, earn XP, and play minigames!
intro.step4: Are you ready? Let's get started!

walkthrough.step1_desc: Let's take a quick guided tour to show you how everything works.
walkthrough.step2_desc: Here is your lesson map. This is where you earn XP and level up!
walkthrough.step3_desc: Use the coins you earned in lessons to buy bonuses and lives.
walkthrough.step4_desc: Explore the rest of the menu whenever you want. Good luck with your learning!
walkthrough.welcome_desc: An immersive gamified experience. Let me show you around!
walkthrough.learn_desc: Here is where the magic happens! Complete lessons, earn XP, and feed your ego. Don't lose your streak!
walkthrough.practice_desc: Train your writing, speaking, and reading with native bots in real-time. Unlimited tries!
walkthrough.leaderboard_desc: Can you reach the Top 3? Or will you cry trying?
walkthrough.quests_desc: New challenges every day to fill your XP chest.
walkthrough.shop_desc: Use your hard-earned coins to buy boosters, freezes, and shields.
walkthrough.ready_desc: You're fully equipped. Now go out there and break records!

seo.title: Faro — Learn Languages by Playing
seo.description: Learn new languages in a fun, interactive, and gamified way. Compete in weekly leagues, earn XP, and join your friends!
seo.keywords: learn languages, learn english, gamification, online languages, faro app, learn languages for free
